sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96114" key="spura/minos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπῡράμινος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πυράμινος</foreign>, <sense id="n96114.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Docum. ant.dell' Africa Italiana</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg017:1:88" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.88</biblScope> </bibl> (Cyrene, <date TEIform="date">iv B.C.</date>); cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σπυρός</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
